header.description: §7Nice little features to make your game much better!
header.name: §fQ§eo§fF §c(1.4.1)

settings.text:
§l§cQ§r§lo§cF§r was made by §c@aitji§r (script) and §9@pickerth-12§r (ideas & design). §7You can tweak everything below to your liking!
§cTurn on BetaAPIs in Experiments
§7How often should QoF run? §8(lower = faster updates) §r
settings.name: qof:INTERVAL_DELAY

settings.text: §7Enable dynamic light?
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.ENABLED

settings.text: §7How §f'long'§8(game tick)§7 should light stay after it turns off? §8(higher = longer) §r
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.DECAY_LIGHT_TICK

settings.text: §7How §f'much'§7 should light be reduced? §8(final = lightLevel * §o[value / 10]§r§8) §r
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.REDUCE_LIGHT

settings.text: §7When fading, how much light is lost each step? §r
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.LIGHT_REDUCE_LINEAR

settings.text: §7How §f'far'§7 can light sources be detected around you? §r
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.LIGHT_RENDER_RADIUS

settings.text: §7How §f'many'§7 light sources can affect you at once? §r
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.LIGHT_RENDER_PER_PLAYER

settings.text: §7How bright should burning entities glow? §8(affected by reduce setting) §r
settings.name: qof:LIGHT.LIGHT_FIRE_LEVEL

settings.text: §7Enable anvil repairing? §r
settings.name: qof:REPAIR_ANVIL.ENABLED

settings.text: §7How long§8(game tick)§7 to hold before repairing starts again? §r
settings.name: qof:REPAIR_ANVIL.REPAIR_HELD_DELAY

settings.text: §7Enable improved composter? §r
settings.name: qof:COMPOSTER.ENABLED

settings.text: §7Should hopper work with composter? §c(can affect performance) §r
settings.name: qof:COMPOSTER.WORK_WITH_HOPPER

settings.text: §l§cQ§r§lo§cF§r Carry Container System §7-------------------------------
§7Allow carrying a container?
settings.name: qof:CARRIED_CHEST.ENABLED

settings.text: §7How many items should be listed in the item lore? §r
settings.name: qof:CARRIED_CHEST.MAX_DISPLAY

settings.text: §7Disable §fjumping§7 while holding a container? §r
settings.name: qof:CARRIED_CHEST.PLAYER_JUMP.NO_JUMP_HOLD_CHEST

settings.text: §7Allow jumping in §9water§7 while holding a container? §r
settings.name: qof:CARRIED_CHEST.PLAYER_JUMP.ALLOW_JUMP_IN_WATER

settings.text: §7Allow jumping in §6lava§7 while holding a container? §r
settings.name: qof:CARRIED_CHEST.PLAYER_JUMP.ALLOW_JUMP_IN_LAVA

settings.name: qof:CARRIED_CHEST.PLAYER_JUMP.ALLOW_JUMP_IN_SCAFFOLDING

settings.text: §7Allow climbing in §pladder§7 while holding a container? §r
settings.name: qof:CARRIED_CHEST.PLAYER_JUMP.ALLOW_JUMP_IN_LADDER

settings.text: §7Allow convert concrete powder hardening in water?
settings.name: qof:WATER_CONCRETE.ENABLED

settings.text:
§7Wait time is calculated* as: §qgame tick§7 = §8[BASE] §7+ √(§gamount§7 - 1) × §8[MULTIPLIER]§7
§7*§pfinal wait time§7 use floor from §qgame tick
§7How long§8(game tick)§7 should base time take? §8(larger = slower)
settings.name: qof:WATER_CONCRETE.SLOW_BASE

settings.text: §7Concrete conversion slowness §8(larger = slower)
settings.name: qof:WATER_CONCRETE.SLOW_MULTIPLIER

settings.text:
§l§cQ§r§lo§cF§r OFFHAND System §7--------------------------------------
§f*Due to minecraft scripts limitation §l§cQ§r§fo§l§cF§r§f currently not support transfer item with nametag/enchantment/color
§7Allow offhand? §8(by double sneaking)
settings.name: qof:OFFHAND.ENABLED

settings.text: §7Replant uses seeds. If you have no seeds or the crop doesn'§7t drop any, it will not replant.
